title: Documentation on Electrical Power Systems and Motors
full_text:
2.2.2.7 Documentation on Electrical Power Systems and Motors
Documentation on Electrical Power Systems and Motors
1) The following documentation on the electrical power systems and motors
shall be provided:
  a) an as-built single-line diagram of the building's electrical distribution system
indicating the locations of means to monitor energy consumption,
  b) schematic diagrams of electrical control systems for systems other than
heating, ventilating and air-conditioning, service water heating, and lighting,
and
  c) the manufacturers' operational manuals for all electrical equipment.

sentences.text: The following documentation on the electrical power systems and motors shall be provided:

clauses.text: an as-built single-line diagram of the building's electrical distribution system indicating the locations of means to monitor energy consumption,
schematic diagrams of electrical control systems for systems other than heating, ventilating and air-conditioning, service water heating, and lighting, and
the manufacturers' operational manuals for all electrical equipment.
